title: Ikura Pasta
description: A simple, yet elegant pasta dish featuring the rich flavor of ikura and the sweetness of jammy sauce.

ingredients.name: pasta
ingredients.notes: Choose a gluten-free option if necessary

ingredients.name: ikura
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen ikura is fine

instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a pan, heat sesame oil over medium heat.
Add ikura and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly browned.
Stir in jammy sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add cooked pasta to the pan and toss with ikura sauce.
Garnish with chopped scallions, if desired.
